description: Configure a system monitoring alert in iDempiere to track high-value vendor invoices. Create a new Alert Rule named 'High Value Purchase' with the subject 'Review Invoice > 1000' that triggers when a Vendor Invoice over $1,000 is completed. Use the SQL clause: SELECT * FROM C_Invoice WHERE IsSOTrx='N' AND DocStatus='CO' AND GrandTotal > 1000. Ensure Client Security is enforced and set 'GardenAdmin' as the alert recipient.
